title: DecoCreate
description: A lil' Decorate and Create modpack.
body:
# DecoCreate

## About
DecoCreate is a building- and decoration-focused modpack designed for creative survival gameplay. It was originally made for personal use, but is shared so friends can easily download and play together via Modrinth.

## Main mods
- **Create** – Mechanical automation and moving contraptions  
- **Farmer’s Delight** – Expanded farming and cooking systems  
- **Supplementaries** – Decorative and functional blocks  
- Several additional decoration and quality-of-life mods

## Gameplay
The focus of this modpack is combining aesthetics with light automation. Build beautiful factories, cozy farms, and detailed worlds while still enjoying functional gameplay.

## Audience
Perfect for players who enjoy building, decorating, and experimenting with automation without overly complex tech mods.

## Notes
This modpack is intended for personal use and playing with friends. Full credit goes to the original mod authors.
